name: stage2-rvv-selected-body-realization-extraction
title: Stage2 RVV selected-body realization module extraction
description: Extract the active RVV selected-body realization dispatcher, validation, fail-closed diagnostics, and typed-body construction into a consumed RVV plugin-local module while preserving existing generic/strided/masked/macc/reduce behavior.
